name: @tsnuke/rules-declaration-api-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of tsnuke's `declaration-api` rule category (RULE-025): 4 SYN AST predicates (explicit-member-accessibility, explicit-module-boundary-types, no-export-assignment, no-mutable-exports). Strangler-fig slice — consumes @tsnuke/rules-core-effect for the rule substrate (defineRule/runRule/Rule/RuleContext) and @tsnuke/contracts-effect for the Diagnostic/RuleMeta contracts. Plain-TS AST predicates wrapping the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (visitors are sync).
